summary: Iteration 76: Forensic Trust Overhaul P0 - Complete code verification of all 6 requirements. (1) Flow reorder confirmed: welcome→analyzing→identity_verification→wow_summary→intelligence-first→completing→dashboard. (2) ForensicIdentityCard has all 4 buttons (Confirm, Edit, Regenerate, Not My Business) with correct data-testids. (3) CTA gating: ctaVisible state with 3s delay after READY in ExecutiveCMOSnapshot. (4) Integration truth suppression via CRM_TERMS in both MarketPage and IntelligencePhases. (5) FloatingSoundboard onboarding message on first open. (6) Scroll fix with overflowY:visible in DashboardLayout main element.

issues: ESLint warning: Line 134 signals useMemo dependency issue (non-blocking, component compiles)

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warning in ForensicIdentityCard.js Line 134 about useMemo dependencies - non-blocking but should be fixed
All 4 buttons in ForensicIdentityCard have correct data-testids for testing
CRM_TERMS list is duplicated in MarketPage.js and IntelligencePhases.js - consider extracting to shared constant
Flow gate is enforced: wow_summary requires identityConfirmed (Line 118 CalibrationAdvisor.js)
CTA gating uses proper React patterns: useState + useEffect with cleanup timer

test_credentials.note: Supabase auth returned 400 in preview environment - code verification only

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 complete. P0 Forensic Trust Overhaul fully verified via code review. Supabase auth does not work in preview environment - login redirects to homepage. All 6 deliverables confirmed: (1) Flow reorder, (2) ForensicIdentityCard with 4 buttons, (3) CTA gating, (4) CRM truth suppression, (5) Soundboard onboarding, (6) Scroll fix. The ForensicIdentityCard is only visible during new user onboarding (entry='identity_verification'), not for already-calibrated users.

mocked_api_confirmation.note: All endpoints are real Supabase Edge Functions and FastAPI routes. CRM integration via Merge.dev is real.

auth_note: Supabase auth credentials (andre@thestrategysquad.com.au / BIQc_Test_2026!) do not work in preview environment. Testing focused on code structure verification as instructed.
